name: ClearView Social
description:
ClearView Social is intended for professional services firms. Built to help amplify their networking and content sharing on social media, it’s a great way to manage employee advocacy, track engagement, and schedule content.

Here’s why it stands out:

  • Custom pricing based on the size and needs of the firm
  • Employee advocacy is a main focus of the platform,  empowering employees to share firm content to their personal pages
  • The content scheduling feature is pretty typical; you can schedule and prompt employees to share content at optimal times to maximize visibility, too
  • With engagement tracking, you can monitor the reach and impact of shared content
  • Supported platforms include LinkedIn, X, and Facebook

Key Features:

✅ Professional networking focus

✅ Employee advocacy tools

✅ Engagement analytics
what_people_say:
What people say :

The platform is especially useful for law firms, accounting firms, and consultancies aiming to boost their professional reach and engagement through employee advocacy.

Here’s what users think:

"ClearView Social has transformed our approach to professional networking. The employee advocacy feature is particularly powerful, helping us amplify our reach without paying for ads. We sometimes struggle with getting all employees consistently engaged in the process, but that’s not the platform’s fault”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Tools to increase employee engagement in advocacy
  • 🚫 Mainly useful for professional services firms
  • 🚫 Integration with broader marketing and CRM systems
